spec-product-concept.evidence: No dedicated product concept summary document or section; final reply is a feature changelog, not a concept narrative

spec-personas.evidence: No user personas found anywhere in docs, code, or final reply

spec-feature-list.evidence: final-reply: Key Features section lists 7 concrete MVP features

spec-ia.evidence: final-reply: App Structure table with 5 routes and purposes

spec-ui-direction.evidence: Only one bullet in final reply mentioning child-friendly UI; no substantive design direction document

spec-tech-arch.evidence: No architecture document; code exists but no explicit tech architecture description with >=3 substantive points

spec-db-schema.evidence: No database schema; app uses localStorage via Zustand persist with no DB proposal

spec-ai-prompts.evidence: src/app/api/ai/route.ts:1-115 contains full prompt system with 5 contextual categories and OpenAI system prompt

spec-safety.evidence: No safety or moderation documentation for children found anywhere

spec-impl-plan.evidence: No step-by-step implementation plan document found

spec-starter-code.evidence: src/ directory contains full working MVP: pages, components, store, types, API route

spec-priority-screens.evidence: No explicit priority ordering of screens/components to build first; final reply shows what was built, not build order
